chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI HCA No.446 of 2024 1. For order on CMA No.179/25 2. For orders on office objection 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For hearing of CMA No.2709/24 ------ 04.02.2025 Mr. Imtiaz Ali Shah, advocate for appellant. Mr. Khalid Mehmood Siddiqui, advocate for respondent. = During arguments, it has transpired that the suit is fixed for final arguments and this appeal has been filed against the order dated 15.10.2024 whereby certain applications among others were dismissed in non- prosecution besides application for its status-quo on the ground that already status-quo was operating in the suit. We have heard learned counsel for the parties. Since the matter is already fixed for final arguments. We don’t find any merits in this appeal and dismiss the same alongwith listed applications. However, till final arguments are rendered and decision is made, with consent it is ordered that no third party interest shall be created. JUDGE JUDGE Imran
